api_key_source.description: The source of the API key for requests, such as HEADER or AUTHORIZER.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the REST API.

binary_media_types.description: A list of binary media types supported by the REST API.

description.description: A description of the REST API.

endpoint_configuration.description: Configuration settings for the API endpoint, including types and VPC endpoint IDs.

execution_arn.description: The execution ARN that includes the stage and method.

id.description: The unique identifier of the REST API.

minimum_compression_size.description: The minimum size in bytes for which compression is enabled.

policy.description: The policy document that controls access to the REST API.

root_resource_id.description: The identifier for the root resource of the REST API.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the REST API.
